name: sync registries: /standards-remove moves the source-folder file to _archived/ rather than deleting (per G-9 "archive folder file to _archived/")
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf "source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id g --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ ! -f tree/google/x.yaml ] && [ -f tree/google/_archived/x.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
